name: Cauliflower Homestyle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F. and lightly butter a 2-quart baking dish.
2. In a kettle of boiling salted water, cook cauliflower for 3 minutes and drain well.
3. In a large non-stick skillet, sauté bread crumbs in butter over moderately high heat, stirring, until golden. Stir in cauliflower and remove skillet from heat.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, sour cream, and mozzarella. Add cauliflower mixture, stirring to combine well.
5. Transfer mixture to baking dish and bake in middle of oven for 25 minutes, or until pale golden.
